name: BI Integration (Prod: Meta Ads to Supabase)

parameters.query:
-- Garante que o canal 'Meta Ads' existe
INSERT INTO dim_channels (name, platform) VALUES ('Meta Ads', 'Meta')
ON CONFLICT (name) DO NOTHING;

-- Garante que o produto existe (criado automaticamente pelo nome da campanha)
INSERT INTO dim_products (name) VALUES ($2)
ON CONFLICT (name) DO NOTHING;

-- Upsert do fato diário
INSERT INTO fact_daily_marketing (date, channel_id, product_id, cost, impressions, clicks, leads)
VALUES (
  $1::DATE,
  (SELECT id FROM dim_channels WHERE name = 'Meta Ads' LIMIT 1),
  (SELECT id FROM dim_products WHERE name = $2 LIMIT 1),
  $3,
  $4,
  $5,
  $6
)
ON CONFLICT (date, channel_id, product_id)
DO UPDATE SET
  cost = EXCLUDED.cost,
  impressions = EXCLUDED.impressions,
  clicks = EXCLUDED.clicks,
  leads = EXCLUDED.leads;
